queries.question: List all the article contents with their respective managing editor and reporter names
queries.sql:
SELECT
Articles.content,
Managing_Editor.name,
Reporters.fullname
FROM Articles
JOIN Final_Draft ON Final_Draft.id = Articles.final_draft_id
JOIN Managing_Editor ON Managing_Editor.id = Final_Draft.managing_editor_id
JOIN Reporters ON Reporters.reporter_id = Articles.reporter_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?content ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?articles p:content ?content .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?reporters p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: List all the articles with their respective editor and author names.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Articles.title,
Managing_Editor.name,
Authors.fullname
FROM Articles
JOIN Final_Draft ON Final_Draft.id = Articles.final_draft_id
JOIN Managing_Editor ON Managing_Editor.id = Final_Draft.managing_editor_id
JOIN Authors ON Authors.author_id = Articles.author_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?authors p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: List all the articles with their respective editor and author names.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Articles.title,
Copy_Editor.name,
Authors.fullname
FROM Articles
JOIN Final_Draft ON Final_Draft.id = Articles.final_draft_id
JOIN Copy_Editor ON Copy_Editor.id = Final_Draft.Copy_Editor_id
JOIN Authors ON Authors.author_id = Articles.author_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?copy_editor a :Copy_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasCopy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?copy_editor p:name ?name .
  ?authors p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: List all the articles with their respective editor and author names.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Articles.title,
Managing_Editor.name, Copy_Editor.name,
Authors.fullname
FROM Articles
JOIN Final_Draft ON Final_Draft.id = Articles.final_draft_id
JOIN Managing_Editor ON Managing_Editor.id = Final_Draft.managing_editor_id
JOIN Authors ON Authors.author_id = Articles.author_id JOIN Copy_Editor ON Copy_Editor.id = Final_Draft.Copy_Editor_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?name2 ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?copy_editor a :Copy_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasCopy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?copy_editor p:name ?name2 .
  ?authors p:name ?fullname .
}

queries.question: List all the article contents with their respective managing editor, copy editor and reporter names
queries.sql:
SELECT
Articles.content,
Managing_Editor.name, Copy_Editor.name,
Reporters.fullname
FROM Articles
JOIN Final_Draft ON Final_Draft.id = Articles.final_draft_id
JOIN Managing_Editor ON Managing_Editor.id = Final_Draft.managing_editor_id
JOIN Reporters ON Reporters.reporter_id = Articles.reporter_id JOIN Copy_Editor ON Copy_Editor.id = Final_Draft.Copy_Editor_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?content ?name ?name2 ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?copy_editor a :Copy_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasCopy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?articles p:content ?content .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?copy_editor p:name ?name2 .
  ?reporters p:name ?fullname .
}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?content ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?articles p:content ?content .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?reporters p:name ?fullname .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?content ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?copy_editor a :Copy_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasCopy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?articles p:content ?content .
  ?copy_editor p:name ?name .
  ?reporters p:name ?fullname .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?content ?name ?name2 ?fullname WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?final_draft a :Final_Draft .
  ?articles p:hasFinal_Draft ?final_draft .
  ?managing_editor a :Managing_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasManaging_Editor ?managing_editor .
  ?reporters a :Reporters .
  ?articles p:hasReporters ?reporters .
  ?copy_editor a :Copy_Editor .
  ?final_draft p:hasCopy_Editor ?copy_editor .
  ?articles p:content ?content .
  ?managing_editor p:name ?name .
  ?copy_editor p:name ?name2 .
  ?reporters p:name ?fullname .
} }
}
